response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, and deep technical breadth across cloud, data, and systems — but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade GenAI solutions, vector databases, or RAG architectures, and his AI experience is embedded within broader software roles rather than centered on GenAI delivery.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Extensive cloud and distributed systems background (AWS, Kubernetes, microservices)
Strong track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI or LLM systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architecture implementations
Limited documentation of LLM optimization, multi-agent frameworks (e.g., LangGraph), or AI evaluation pipelines
